content:
Please see
https://github.com/i-net-software/dokuwiki-plugin-siteexport/issues/131
https://forum.dokuwiki.org/d/22292-xampp-dokuwiki-installation
I am convinced siteexport will complete fully, once I can configure a local apache+dokuwiki+opencpn-data that will allow siteexport to complete without the result "Finished but download failed." The server version uses the correct TOC and namespaces but fails on timeout.
Many thanks to all the Editors who have done a wonderful polished up job on the manual!

Also this shows the siteexport configuration needed.
https://github.com/samuelet/indexmenu/issues/314
